nasb.text: The Lord is exalted, for He dwells on high; He has filled Zion with justice and righteousness.

esv.text: The Lord is exalted, for he dwells on high; he will fill Zion with justice and righteousness,

cnv.text: 耶和華必被尊崇，因為他居住在高天； 他必以公平與公義充滿錫安。

ccb.text: 耶和华受尊崇， 因为祂住在高天之上， 祂必使锡安充满公平和公义。

csbs.text: 耶和华受尊崇，因他居于高天， 他必使锡安充满公正和公义。
